allow: PowerShell($root = "d:\\Dhaval Codes\\Website"; Write-Output "=== /assets ==="; Get-ChildItem "$root\\assets" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Length -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== /public ==="; Get-ChildItem "$root\\public" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Length -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== /src/assets \(should not exist\) ==="; if \(Test-Path "$root\\src\\assets"\) { Get-ChildItem "$root\\src\\assets" | Format-Table Name } else { Write-Output "absent \(good\)" })
